title: IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Engineer Posts
description: The Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur has released the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Project Engineer Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Electrical Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list...
